purpose: Classify and standardise functional interactive dashboards across folders, workbooks, applications, projects, and function hierarchy.

dashboardOrders.name: System landing dashboard
dashboardOrders.function: navigation, package status, source authority, blockers, next actions

dashboardOrders.name: Project landing dashboard
dashboardOrders.function: project progress, claim gates, filesets, source references, open tasks

dashboardOrders.name: Function landing dashboard
dashboardOrders.scope: function, lens, equation group, paradox, technology family, or workbook surface
dashboardOrders.function: inputs, outputs, evidence class, dependencies, validation state

spreadsheetDashboardTypes.use: workbook status, owner, source authority, blockers, finalisation state
source rows, metrics, progress, and coverage
functions and lenses such as EML, MMB, Paradoxes Solved, Raphael Equations, Raphael Natural Phenomena
project current state, progress, claims, source files, next tasks
tailored investor-facing summary independent from operational folders
version collapse, extraction status, canonical-copy status, approval status

interactiveRequirements: dashboard must expose source authority links or source IDs
dashboard must show open tasks or next actions
dashboard must support drilldown from system to project to function where applicable
spreadsheet dashboards must use formulas, filters, pivots, charts, or slicer-equivalent structures rather than static title pages only
web dashboards must expose route state, claim gate, publish visibility, and last-updated metadata
investor dashboards must separate investor-safe summary from internal operations
archive dashboards must separate canonical candidate, archive copy, and duplicate-after-extraction states

visualConsistency.fieldRule: Use project-specific assets and palettes. Do not impose the Achilles wordmark across unrelated project dashboards.

functionalHierarchy.topScope: Type 1 Kardashev readiness and stewardship scope
functionalHierarchy.rollupRule: Lower-order function dashboards roll up to project dashboards; project dashboards roll up to system dashboards.

googleEarthPlacement.reason: tailoring, excavation, build, and investor-facing spatial context independent from operations

folderDashboardRule: Create landing dashboards for the highest three folder or project orders where filesets are stable enough to navigate.
excelDashboardRule: Each consolidated workbook should land on the appropriate dashboard type rather than a raw version tab. Logs remain at the back.
guardrails: link dashboards to source authority and OPEN_TASKS
nextActions: Classify Data_Achilles_Dashboard_Code_Block_CL3_v0_1 as a reusable dashboard block
Add dashboard class to workbook collapse plans
Add dashboard map entries to the holistic package map
Prepare route proof packets before public deployment
Bind uploaded brand assets to dashboard families
